name: Simple Document Summary
description: Reads a document and produces a structured summary — the simplest possible FlowForge flow

nodes.name: Extract Document Content
nodes.instructions: Read the input document. Extract the title, author (if present), date, and all section headings with their content. Write a structured JSON file with the extracted content.

nodes.name: Generate Summary
nodes.instructions: Using the extracted content, produce a 1-page summary in markdown. Include: a one-paragraph overview, a bullet list of key points (max 5), and a 'Notable Details' section for anything surprising or important.
